programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: In 1993, the U.S. sends special forces into Somalia to destabilize the government and bring food and humanitarian aid to the starving population. From there, the U.S. soldiers must struggle to regain their balance while enduring heavy gunfire.

programme.title: Colombiana
programme.desc: In 1992 Bogotá, a little girl watches crime lord Don Luis and his henchman Marco murder her parents. Fifteen years later, the now-grown Cataleya, who is named for a Colombian orchid, works as a contract killer for her Chicago-based uncle. Leaving a lipstick drawing of her namesake on every victim, Cataleya carries out her assignments with efficiency and dreams of avenging her family.

programme.desc: A celebration of the life and career of Oscar Peterson, one of Canada's greatest jazz musicians and a master pianist.

programme.title: Night of the Zoopocalypse
programme.desc: When a meteor unleashes a virus that turns zoo animals into zombies, a mountain lion and a wolf lead a team of survivors to save the day.

programme.title: All Light, Everywhere
programme.desc: Filmmaker Theo Anthony offers a far-ranging look at the biases in how people see things, focusing on the recorded image.

programme.title: Secret Headquarters
programme.desc: Friendship and courage take center stage when Charlie and his friends stumble upon the headquarters of the Guard and realize the world's most powerful superhero is Charlie's dad. When an evil businessman sends in a team to infiltrate the lair and retrieve the Guard's energy source, the youngsters spring into action and turn the tables on the intruders.

programme.title: Moonraker
programme.desc: Agent 007 blasts into orbit in this action-packed adventure that takes him to Venice, Rio de Janeiro and outer space. When Bond investigates the hijacking of an American space shuttle, he and beautiful CIA agent Holly Goodhead are soon locked in a life-or-death struggle against Hugo Drax, a power-mad industrialist whose horrific scheme may destroy all human life on Earth!

programme.title: Stephen King's It
programme.desc: In 1960, seven preteen outcasts fight an evil demon that poses as a child-killing clown. Thirty years later, they reunite to stop the demon once and for all when it returns to their hometown.

programme.title: Oscar Peterson: Black + White
programme.desc: A celebration of the life and career of Oscar Peterson, one of Canada's greatest jazz musicians and a master pianist.

programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: Richard Montanez, the son of a Mexican immigrant, was a janitor at Frito-Lay when he came up with the idea for Flamin' Hot Cheetos. His creation, inspired by the flavors of his community, revitalized Frito-Lay and disrupted the food industry.

programme.title: Stop Making Sense
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jonathan Demme captures Talking Heads and an ecstatic ensemble of musicians at their exhilarating best in this iconic live performance.

programme.title: Solemates
programme.desc: A love triangle between a shoe store owner, a customer and an old pair of shoes. When Andrew walks into William's store to replace his own worn old pair of brogues, interest is piqued.

programme.title: Selena + Chef
programme.desc: Selena bows down to two iconic chefs who have been behind many dinners in her life: restaurateurs, authors and BFFs Jon and Vinny; together, they attempt to make roasted chicken with cilantro sauce and a tomato bruschetta appetizer.

programme.title: Selena + Chef
programme.desc: Southern California chef Nyesha Arrington guides Selena through cooking two meals: pan-seared branzino with spiced tomato-coconut sauce and home cooked doggy biscuits, allowing Selena to show off all her new skills.

programme.title: Never Say Never Again
programme.desc: An aging James Bond (Sean Connery) makes an uncharacteristic mistake during a routine training mission, leading M (Edward Fox) to believe that the legendary British Intelligence spy is now past his prime. M indefinitely suspends Bond from active duty. However, when SPECTRE member Fatima Bush (Barbara Carrera) and her fellow terrorists successfully steal two nuclear missiles from the U.S. military,

programme.title: For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: When a British ship is sunk in foreign waters, the world's superpowers begin a feverish race to find its cargo: a nuclear submarine control system. And 007 (Roger Moore) is thrust into one of his most riveting adventures as he rushes to join the search ... and prevent global devastation!

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Deborah deals with the fallout of her passing; Ava tries to manage the press.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom moves to Boston to chase her lifelong dream of opening her own business. A chance meeting with charming neurosurgeon Ryle Kincaid soon sparks an intense connection, but as the two fall deeply in love, she begins to see sides of Ryle that remind her of her parents' relationship. When Lily's first love, Atlas Corrigan, suddenly reenters her life, her relationship with Ryle gets upended, l

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.title: Quasi
programme.desc: A hapless hunchback yearns for love, but finds himself in the middle of a deadly feud between the Pope and the King of France when they each order the misfit to kill the other.

programme.title: Paseo
programme.desc: A woman becomes displaced and alienated by her surroundings while traveling through Spain. She begins to lose control of her emotional and psychological self as she explores another possible life.

programme.title: Lovely
programme.desc: An up-and-coming boxer from the projects begins questioning his dream after unforeseen circumstances alter his life.

programme.title: Rush for Your Life
programme.desc: Journalism student Tasha goes under cover as a sorority pledge to expose the people responsible for the death of a student the prior year. She quickly finds herself completing dangerous hazing rituals to secure a spot in the sorority.

programme.title: Air Bud
programme.desc: Diffident in the wake of his father's death, high schooler Josh (Kevin Zegers) struggles to adapt to his new home in Washington state. After Bud joins the team, Josh's life brightens considerably, until th

programme.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
programme.desc: Teenager Josh (Kevin Zegers) just became the legal owner of his basketball-playing dog, Buddy. programme.title: Gunda

programme.title: Live and Let Die
